title: gentiana froelichii subsp. froelichii
intro: Gentiana froelichii subsp. froelichii, also known as the Chinese gentian, is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family. This perennial plant is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Gentiana froelichii subsp. froelichii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support liver function. Gentiana froelichii subsp. froelichii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
